bucket_name_array.title: Bucket name
bucket_name_array.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket name, e.g. my_gcs_bucket

file_names_array.title: File names
file_names_array.description: Files names in Google Cloud Storage bucket

use_file_path.title: Use File Path
use_file_path.description: If checked file path or pattern will be used instead of file names.

file_path.title: File Path
file_path.description: Path to the file or files. Example: "bucket/folder*/2023-*"

new_files_only.title: Download only new files
new_files_only.description: If set to true, downloads only files which were updated after last run of component.

custom_tag.title: Custom Tag (optional)
custom_tag.description: One or more tags separated by comma added to Keboola Storage for all downloaded files

permanent.title: Permanent Files (optional)
permanent.description: If set to true, downloaded files will be stored as permanent in Keboola storage. Otherwise, they will be deleted after 14 days.
